channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight Release Date Preponed
item.content:encoded:
LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is now releasing a week earlier, on May 22, 2026.

There are still a few months left before the release of LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight, but the entire community is excited about the upcoming title based on what has been revealed so far. We know the game features over 100 iconic suits and that its open world is larger than Arkham Knight’s. Now, players will have the opportunity to experience everything a week early.

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight Now Releases on May 22, 2026

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight’s initial release date was May 29, 2026; however, a new announcement from the official X account (formerly Twitter) states that the game will arrive early, on May 22, 2026. This means that the early access for the Deluxe edition has been moved up as well, with players who own this edition getting to play the game from May 19.

If you are looking to purchase the game, the pre-order bonus will include “The Dark Knight Returns” Batsuit. There are two editions of the title: Standard, which only includes the base game, and Deluxe, which includes a whole bunch of new and post-launch DLC content.

Through the Deluxe edition, players get access to the Legacy Collection, which includes the Arkham Trilogy Pack, Batman Beyond Pack, and Party Music Pack. Then you have the Mayhem Collection, a separate post-launch DLC planned for September 2026. It will include new playable characters, Joker and Harley Quinn, a new story mission, and Mayhem mode. Players also get the Sinister pack and 3 days of early access.

In other Batman news, 007 First Light took inspiration from the Batman: Arkham and Uncharted series for combat. Additionally, the Batman: Arkham Shadow sequel might be canceled after the developer was affected by recent Meta layoffs. What are your thoughts on LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight releasing a week earlier? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about the Hitman live-action TV series being “dead in the water”. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Does Death Stranding 2 PC Have Denuvo? Death Stranding 2 DRM Status, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Death Stranding 2 on PC raises the question of Denuvo, and an answer needs to be delivered. Denuvo and the concept of DRM aren’t thought fondly of in the PC community, so let’s check out if you have to worry about Denuvo with DS2.

Ah, Denuvo. The dastardly ‘D’ word that gives everyone who owns a PC the chills. It means well, but it isn’t swell if you want to enjoy a PC game to its full potential. Death Stranding 2 looks and plays phenomenally on PS5, and Denuvo wouldn’t be good if you’re on PC.

Is Denuvo Used in Death Stranding 2 PC?

Right now, it doesn’t seem like Death Stranding 2 uses any sort of DRM, including Denuvo.

You can breathe a sigh of relief. Looking at Steam, as well as a lack of updates from Kojima Productions, it seems as if Death Stranding 2 will not be protecting itself using any form of DRM. It goes without saying that this includes Denuvo, so if you were worried about DRM ruining the game’s performance or visuals, then it’s all good!

  • More Insider Gaming: Death Stranding 2 PC Release Date & Start Times

Denuvo is infamously known for protecting a game from piracy, but at the expense of the game’s performance and a myriad of other issues. It’s so obtrusive that people will simply not buy a PC port at all if it uses a DRM—with Denuvo being the main one.

Did Death Stranding 1 On PC Use Denuvo?

The original Death Stranding originally debuted on PC with Denuvo enabled, but the developer removed this some time after launch and cut loose any DRM ties to improve the game experience overall.

Death Stranding launched with Deunvo, but this decision was later reversed. Denuvo didn’t appear in DS1 again, nor did it feature in the Director’s Cut edition that was released a year or two later.

  • More Insider Gaming: Death Stranding 2 PC Specifications Revealed

Just to be clear, Steam is not advertising DS2 using Denuvo or any other DRM, nor has it been communicated anywhere else. If this changes, we’ll update this guide and let you know.

One way to keep on top of this is by visiting and becoming acquainted with the Insider Gaming Discord!

Make sure you check out the news that Death Stranding 2 on PC has ‘New Modes and Features’ for both platforms.

MOBILE APP

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today (#1010)—Answers for Tuesday, March 17
item.content:encoded:
How has your week started? I apologise, I missed Monday’s NYT Connections hints – I hope you can forgive me! I’ll make up for it today with the best spin around Tuesday’s NYT Connections solutions you could ever want. With this guide, you’ll breeze through today’s challenge and emerge victorious in a matter of seconds.

Scroll down to secure the answers you need for today’s NYT Connections puzzle!

How to Play NYT Connections

In June 2023, NYT Connections emerged as yet another game in the ever-growing lineup of the New York Times titles. This title soared immediately, and it’s easy to see why. As a free-to-play, accessible New York Times game, NYT Connections is available worldwide and can be played on desktop devices or in a mobile app.

But how do you play NYT Connections?

The NYT team will provide you with a grid of 16 words once a day. The only task left up to you is to sort those words into four groups of four by finding their commonalities. Every NYT Connections puzzle has just one solution, and some words can have double meanings, so it can sometimes be tricky to figure out the answers.

It’s also important to stress that the words are color-coded: yellow, blue, green, and purple. That’s in order of difficulty, from least to most.

What’s critical here is that you get four guesses every day, and if you use those, your NYT Connections answers for today will be out of reach, as it’ll be game over.

Today’s NYT Connections Hints (March 17)

Here are the words from today’s NYT Connections puzzle:

  • KITE
  • WIND
  • HOT WATER
  • KEY
  • TEA BAG
  • LIGHTNING
  • BALLOON
  • JAM
  • PITCH
  • ARROW
  • BIND
  • SCALE
  • YO-YO
  • TONE
  • ROCKET
  • PICKLE

And here are the hints I can offer for today’s NYT Connections:

  • Yellow – Words you might associate with being stuck
  • Green – Words you might use when composing music
  • Blue – Words you might associate with things going up and down
  • Purple – Words you’d associate with things going fast

Here’s the final warning before we get to the NYT Connections answers for today, March 17:

Are you sure you want to scroll further?

Very well!

NYT Connections Answers Explained for Today, March 17 (#1010)

If you want to jump straight to the answers for today’s NYT Connections puzzle, I’ve got you covered:

  • Yellow – BIND, HOT WATER, JAM, PICKLE
  • Green – KEY, PITCH, SCALE, TONE
  • Blue – BALLOON, KITE, TEA BAG, YO-YO
  • Purple – ARROW, LIGHTNING, ROCKET, WIND

When Does NYT Connections Reset?

That’s today’s puzzle, but if you want the next one, the game resets daily at midnight local time (that’s your local time). You’ll have 24 hours to complete the puzzle when midnight ticks over in your timezone.

How did you do? Did you get a perfect run? Let me know what your streak looks like on the Insider Gaming Discord server

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Cyberpunk 2077 PS5 Pro Enhanced Update Coming Soon
item.content:encoded:
CD Projekt Red has announced that Cyberpunk 2077 will receive a free PS5 Pro Enhanced update soon.

Since the release of the PS5 Pro in November 2024, many games have received enhanced updates to take advantage of the mid-generation refresh. Some titles, like Cyberpunk 2077, initially relied on the console’s hardware to improve performance. However, the game is now getting a dedicated update that will fully utilize the new technology.

Cyberpunk 2077 is receiving a PS5 Pro Enhanced Update Along with the Upgraded PSSR

A recent post from the official Cyberpunk 2077 X account (formerly Twitter) announces that a PS5 Pro update for the game is expected in the “not-too-distant future,” with additional details to be shared in the coming weeks. The developers have clarified that this update will not introduce any new in-game content; rather, it is designed to take advantage of the enhanced hardware capabilities of the PS5 Pro.

Sony has announced a list of games that will soon take advantage of the upgraded PSSR for the PS5 Pro. Most of these titles will receive the update on March 17, 2026. However, some games, such as Assassin’s Creed: Shadows and Cyberpunk 2077, will benefit from the new technology in the coming weeks. It’s possible that the PS5 Pro Enhanced update for Cyberpunk 2077 will be available when the developers are ready to implement the upgraded PSSR.

In other news, CD Projekt Red has stated that they have “no plans” to make new DLCs or expansions for Cyberpunk 2077. Additionally, Epic Games has teased another Cyberpunk 2077 x Fortnite collaboration on social media. What are your thoughts on Cyberpunk 2077 finally receiving a PS5 Pro Enhanced update? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about how data from Pokémon GO players will be used to help robots make precise deliveries. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

item.title: EMEA Masters Winter 2026 Playoffs Draw Confirmed
item.content:encoded:
While elite teams compete at First Stand, EMEA Masters Winter 2026 is deciding the best two-tier teams in the Europe, Middle East, and Africa region.

The League of Legends tournament has been blown open after shock defeats to G2 Nord eliminated Witchcraft, the spiritual successor to Los Ratones.

This year’s Winter event is even more important, as the top two teams will qualify for the Esports World Cup Qualifier and compete with LEC teams for a chance to play internationally at the lucrative EWC event in Saudi Arabia later this year.

As Academy teams can’t participate in the Esports World Cup, two of French Flair, Misa Esports, Eintracht Spandau, Gallions, Berlin International Gaming, Solary, and Unicorns of Love Sexy Edition will earn a spot in the qualifier tournament.

EMEA Masters Winter Playoffs Draw

Following the Champions Round, Misa Esports, Movistar KOI Fénix, Solary, and Verdant earned a bye into the second round of the Playoffs.

They will await the winners of the upcoming best-of-three series with the following draw:

  • G2 Nord vs French Flair – Winner faces Misa Esports
  • Eintracht Spandau vs Gallions – Winner faces Movistar KOI Fénix
  • Berlin International Gaming vs Karmine Corp Blue – Winner faces Solary
  • Team Heretics Academy vs Unicorns Of Love Sexy Edition – Winner faces Verdant

All four teams from both France’s LFL and Germany-based Prime League have qualified for the Playoffs

EMEA Masters Winter has a double elimination bracket, meaning teams will drop into the lower bracket after their first loss and will be eliminated from the event following a second defeat.

The playoffs, which begin March 23, will be best-of-threes until the semi-finals and final, which will be best-of-fives.

Following some upsets, the tournament is anyone’s to win. Who do you think will be crowned EMEA Masters Winter champions? Share your predictions on the Insider Gaming Discord.

It’s going to be an interesting season, Rekkles has announced he isn’t retiring from LoL despite Witchcraft’s elimination.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/emea-masters-winter-2026-playoffs-draw-confirmed/

item.title: Crimson Desert, Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, and More Added to Upgraded PSSR List
item.content:encoded:
Crimson Desert, Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, and several others will be able to utilise PS5 Pro’s upgraded PSSR.

Sony revealed they are rolling out an upgraded version of the PS5 Pro’s upscaling tech, PSSR (PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution), soon, with Resident Evil Requiem being the first game to use it. Then they added Control and Alan Wake 2 to the list, and now more games have made it to the list.

Full List of Games That Will Use PS5 Pro’s Upgraded PSSR

A new PlayStation blog post reveals that several games, including Crimson Desert, will soon be able to use the PS5 Pro’s upgraded PSSR. Several of their partners, including Konami Digital Entertainment, Electronic Arts, Remedy Entertainment, Ninja Theory, Square Enix, Koei Tecmo Games, Capcom, and more. Check out the full list of all the games that will be using upgraded PSSR in the near future below:

  • Silent Hill 2
  • Silent Hill f
  • Dragon Age: The Veilguard
  • Control
  • Alan Wake 2
  • Senua’s Saga: Hellblade 2
  • Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth
  • Nioh 3
  • Rise of the Ronin
  • Monster Hunter Wilds
  • Dragon’s Dogma 2
  • Crimson Desert
  • Cyberpunk 2077
  • Assassin’s Creed Shadows

Most of the games will receive the upgraded PSSR via a PS5 system software update that will roll out in phases starting March 16 at 10:00 PM Pacific Time and will gradually become available to all users. Crimson Desert will get it at launch on March 19, and games like Assassin’s Creed Shadows and Cyberpunk 2077 will get it in the coming weeks.

In other news, check out the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog and Classics Catalog titles for March 2026. Additionally, a leak claims that the PlayStation 1 LEGO set will be arriving this year. What are your thoughts on games like Crimson Desert, Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, and more receiving the upgraded PSSR? Leave your thoughts down in the comments, and join the official Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more information from Insider Gaming, read about Doom: the Dark Ages Denuvo being cracked by pirates. Don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
